title: salix × retusoides
intro: Salix × retusoides, also known as the hybrid willow, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Salix × retusoides include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
